calendar.matters:
First Amended Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Release Property From Mechanics Lien
Off Calendar Jun-04-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Nathan L. Scheg (925-399-6108) for Plaintiff/Moving party DONALD GLICKMAN and DYANNE FRIEDLANDER.
No other appearances.

Hearing is held. Argued re: lien, jurisdiction, good cause and notice served. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PETITIONER DONALD GLICKMAN and DYANNE FRIEDLANDER's First Amended Hearing On Petition To Release Property From Mechanics Lien is granted. Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not Reported (D501)

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Release Property From Mechanics Lien
Off Calendar May-17-2018 Off Calendar
